sourceMovie.title: STRAW
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit STRAW for the same reason it broke through in 2025: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a drama rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. Tyler Perry keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The thriller and drama blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Panic Room
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If STRAW clicked for you, Panic Room (2002) is a strong next stop: both trade in thriller and drama, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after STRAW?
faq.answer: Try Panic Room, Dog Day Afternoon, A Perfect World—each shares DNA with STRAW while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is STRAW?
faq.answer: STRAW (2025) is best described as Thriller, Drama, Crime. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is STRAW worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.7/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this thriller lane.
